calculationSteps.label: Kernel Weights
calculationSteps.explanation: 32 convolutional filters of size 3x3 convolving over 3 RGB channels. Stride 2 downsamples output to 112x112.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

calculationSteps.label: Depthwise weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Applies one independent 3x3 filter per channel, separating spatial convolutions from channel mixing.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

calculationSteps.label: Pointwise weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Combines spatial activations across channels.

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 1
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (32 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (64 ch).

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 2
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (64 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (128 ch).

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 3
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (128 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (128 ch).

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 4
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (128 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (256 ch).

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 5
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (256 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (256 ch).

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 6
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (256 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (512 ch).

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 7
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (512 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (512 ch).

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 8
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (512 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (512 ch).

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 9
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (512 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (512 ch).

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 10
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (512 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (512 ch).

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 11
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (512 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (512 ch).

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 12
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (512 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (1024 ch).

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 13
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (1024 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (1024 ch).

groups.name: Global Pooling & Classification
groups.description: GAP followed by the dense prediction head.
